summary: Out Indicators Live Game Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a game is in-progress
AND Hides Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN an out is made in the inning
steps.result:
THEN the corresponding out indicator is displayed in yellow
AND out indicators are displayed in gray if the corresponding out has not been made
AND the left out indicator corresponds to the first out
AND the center out indicator corresponds to the second out
AND the right out indicator corresponds to the third out
AND the out indicators are center-right justified below the base indicators in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
